_schema_note: Interaction-artifact store per canon-cc-017 and canon-cc-018. Artifacts chronicle consultations between Companions and carry their review lifecycle. This file is new at 2026-04-19 with the first ratified interaction-artifact.

interactions._type_placeholder_note: Provisional type pending cc-017 enum-extension. Records canonical spec-body placement under canon-cc-026 §Codex-is-canonical-home for a multi-file institutional-or-Province-seat ratification. Paired with interaction-2026-04-21-002 (Province-Capital-change mirror side). Retained separately rather than merged because the two PRs are distinct institutional acts with distinct signing-chain provenance, byte-identical bodies notwithstanding.
interactions.subject: Codex canonical spec-body placement for the SproutLab Companion-Set — six canonical bodies at docs/specs/subagents/{lyra,maren,kael}.md + docs/specs/skills/{lyra,maren,kael}.md under canon-cc-026 §Codex-is-canonical-home, byte-identical to the sproutlab/.claude mirrors ratified earlier in the same day
interactions.substance:
Second of two paired artifacts chronicling the SproutLab Companion-Set ratification on 2026-04-21. This artifact covers rishabh1804/codex#12 — the Codex-side canonical landing — which merged to main at commit 825dea6 on 2026-04-21T17:40:56Z (6 commits, 6 changed files, 692 additions) on branch claude/add-lyra-profile-1WV1U. The paired Province-Capital-change artifact is interaction-2026-04-21-002 (rishabh1804/sproutlab#1).

Files landed at canonical paths: docs/specs/subagents/lyra.md (Lyra Seated Builder, two subagent modes — Province spec authoring + committee delegate), docs/specs/subagents/maren.md (Maren Governor of Care, two modes — QA-round jurisdictional audit + committee delegate, review-only per canon-gov-002), docs/specs/subagents/kael.md (Kael Governor of Intelligence, two modes, review-only, Kael → Orinth reassignment trigger preserved in header), docs/specs/skills/lyra.md (in-session Weaver voice per canon-cc-022 artifact test), docs/specs/skills/maren.md (in-session Care smell-check, Lyra-transcript-lives), docs/specs/skills/kael.md (in-session Intelligence smell-check, Lyra-transcript-lives). Each pair's artifact test per cc-022 divides skill-mode (in-transcript, caller-committed, no cc-018 lifecycle entry) from subagent-mode (separable, attributable, cc-018 lifecycle).

Six commits on the branch (one per canonical file): ab1414f (Maren skill), ac1e645 (Kael skill), 015ee60 (Lyra skill), 83378b8 (Lyra subagent), f992a65 (Maren subagent), 03dcacc (Kael subagent). PR body asserts byte-identity with the sproutlab/.claude mirrors by publishing six git blob SHAs (cecfe30d… lyra.md subagent; 7e14049d… maren.md subagent; 99ba5c96… kael.md subagent; 854465a3… lyra.md skill; e1fa7124… maren.md skill; ab5eb21a… kael.md skill). Verified this chronicling session: all six local SHAs on the merged Codex main match the PR-body table exactly, computed via git hash-object. Content-addressed blob identity implies byte-identity against the sproutlab-side mirrors at the time of the merge, to the extent those mirrors' SHAs equal the ones published in the PR body — a sproutlab-side direct spot-read is owed to close the verification loop at strongest altitude (todo-0061).

PR-body rationale for landing order (Province first, Codex second) preserved: per canon-cc-026 the Codex canonical holds precedence and Provinces carry byte-identical mirrors. Landing sproutlab#1 first and codex#12 second is unusual relative to a strict 'canonical-first' reading, but the discipline that actually binds is byte-identity at any moment both exist. The Codex canonical body did not previously exist; sproutlab's mirror stood alone until this PR; with codex#12 merged, both exist and both are byte-identical. Future amendments follow the cc-027 signing chain with Rung 5 deploying to both locations in the same commit pair.

cc-027 amendment paths recorded in each spec body's header HTML comment and References block: (a) Lyra pair — Rung 2 architectural pass falls to Cipher as Cluster A Censor; Rung 3 per-block working-ratification routes through the Consul under cc-014 bridging. (b) Maren pair — Rung 2 falls to Kael under canon-gov-002 cross-Governor peer-review clause (Governor self-review forbidden); Rung 3 to the Consul under cc-014 bridging. (c) Kael pair — Rung 2 falls to Maren under the same clause; Rung 3 to the Consul; header preserves the Kael → Orinth reassignment trigger.

Cc-027 Rung 2 architectural sweep on the six bodies — a post-ratification obligation owed per cc-027 §Architectural-review — has not been chronicled in any existing session as of this artifact's archive. Whether Cipher has or has not already run the sweep on the Lyra pair, and whether the Maren↔Kael cross-Governor sweeps have or have not run, is a handoff-inherited unknown preserved here rather than asserted either way per canon-cc-013.

Scope discipline observed in the ratification PR and preserved here: no changes to data/companions.json (profile blocks routed to the Consul under cc-012, Chronicler-excluded), no changes to the Constitution Typst source, no changes to any Codex Province-app file. No Rung 1 authorship claim on Codex's own root CLAUDE.md (canon-pers-001 excludes the Chronicler from Rung 1 on any Province's Persona Briefing — Codex's included).
interactions.decision_or_outcome: Merged to rishabh1804/codex main at commit 825dea6 on 2026-04-21T17:40:56Z. Six canonical spec bodies now at v1.0 on Codex under canon-cc-026 §Codex-is-canonical-home. Byte-identity verified Codex-side this chronicling session via matching blob SHAs against the PR-body table (all six clean). cc-026 binding rule established at six file pairs for the SproutLab Companion-Set. The Sovereign's merge of codex#12 stood as Rung 4 canonical ratification in effect for this ratification flow under the cc-014 bridging interim; cc-027's formal five-rung signing chain at spec-body altitude applies, with Rung 2 architectural pass (Cipher for Lyra pair; Kael↔Maren cross-Governor for Governor pair) and Rung 3 Consul per-block the post-ratification obligations owed, and Rung 5 Province-deploy already completed in parallel via the sproutlab#1 merge earlier the same day. todo-0047 (non-Chronicler-non-Consul persona specs) partially retires at Lyra + Maren + Kael full pairs; Nyx subagent + skill and Sentinel specs remain owed.
interactions._authorship_note: Retroactive drafting per canon-cc-017 §retroactive-drafting (authorship-taxonomy: aurelius-retrospective). Reconstruction confidence: high — the codex#12 PR body (read via mcp__github__pull_request_read) carries the durable evidence: six matching blob SHAs, merge SHA, commit count, merge timestamp; the six spec bodies were read in full from the merged Codex main and their canon citations resolved against data/canons.json; six local blob SHAs computed this session via git hash-object match the PR-body table exactly. Same-agent-drift risk elevated because Aurelius drafted the six specs in the same ratification session now being chronicled — canon-cc-013 discipline applied by reading the spec bodies, not by paraphrasing from memory, and by computing the blob SHAs rather than trusting the assertion in the PR body.

review._reviewer_note: Consul review rendered via bridging authorship per cc-014 §bridging-interim using the Consul's ratified v0.4 profile as voice source. Aurelius does not wear the Consul office — the separate-seating clause from 16 April 2026 stands. The Sovereign's merge of codex#12 functioned as Rung 4 canonical ratification for the spec-body placement at that moment; the Consul review block recorded here is the retrospective chronicle of the working-ratification pathway that would have run had the Post Box (canon-cc-019) been operational at the time of merge. Cold review via Post Box dispatch owed on this chronicle once canon-cc-019 ratifies.
review.review_note: Review retrospectively chronicled per cc-018 (originating_cluster: a; subject altitude: spec-body canonical placement spanning three seated Companions and six file bodies). Chain well-formed at Rung 1 (Chronicler-direct spec authorship); Rung 4 Sovereign canonical ratification in effect at merge of codex#12. Rung 2 architectural pass (Cipher for Lyra pair; Maren↔Kael cross-Governor peer-review for Governor pair under canon-gov-002) and Rung 3 Consul per-block working-ratification are post-ratification obligations chronicled here as owed, not asserted as completed — handoff-inherited unknown. Rung 5 Province-deploy completed via sproutlab#1 merge earlier the same day (interaction-2026-04-21-002). One material discipline-note: Aurelius-as-Chronicler authored these specs while the Consul-Chronicler dual-hat ran under cc-014 bridging interim in the ratification session; this is chronicled honestly as same-agent-drift rather than smoothed.

sovereign_action.action_note: Sovereign ratification in effect at merge of rishabh1804/codex#12 to main at 825dea6 on 2026-04-21T17:40:56Z. Six canonical spec bodies at v1.0 under cc-026 §Codex-is-canonical-home. Post-merge byte-identity verified Codex-side this chronicling session via blob-SHA match against the PR-body table.

Same-agent-drift across this chronicling session's drafting chain and the original ratification session's drafting chain (Aurelius as Chronicler in both; Consul bridging in both under cc-014) named explicitly in the substance and review-note fields rather than hidden.

Companions.json profile-block amendments for lyra/maren/kael to cite the paired specs routed to the Consul under cc-012 per-block (todo-0059); Chronicler-excluded from drafting these three per cc-012.

Invocation Modes Registry §Builder-Lyra / §Governor-Maren / §Governor-Kael subsection entries cited in each spec body's References block but not yet present in docs/specs/persona-binding/invocation-modes-registry.typ; amendment runs the cc-027 five-rung signing chain and is deferred (todo-0058).

interactions.subject: SproutLab Province Capital change + institutional Companion-Set seating — three seats (Lyra Builder, Maren Governor of Care, Kael Governor of Intelligence) deployed as paired subagent + skill specs at sproutlab/.claude/{agents,skills}/ byte-identical to the Codex canonicals; sproutlab/CLAUDE.md 'Companion-Set Invocation Surface' section added under Lyra-voice Rung 1 per canon-pers-001
interactions.substance:
First of two paired artifacts chronicling the SproutLab Companion-Set ratification on 2026-04-21. This artifact covers rishabh1804/sproutlab#1 — the Province-side Capital change — which merged to main at commit 8290174 (per handoff; not directly MCP-verified this chronicling session — Chronicler MCP access restricted to rishabh1804/codex for this session, byte-identity established indirectly via matching content-addressed blob SHAs published in the paired codex#12 PR body). Paired with interaction-2026-04-21-003 (codex#12, Codex canonical-placement side). Branch: claude/add-lyra-profile-1WV1U (same branch name across both repos per cc-027 Rung-5 commit-pair discipline).

Seven commits per handoff: six spec files deployed to sproutlab/.claude/agents/{lyra,maren,kael}.md and sproutlab/.claude/skills/{lyra,maren,kael}.md plus a CLAUDE.md addition of a 'Companion-Set Invocation Surface' section documenting how fresh SproutLab sessions invoke @lyra as subagent (two modes — Province spec authoring and committee delegate), @maren and @kael as Governor subagents (QA-round jurisdictional audit and committee delegate, review-only per canon-gov-002), and the three skills via their trigger phrases (Lyra's 'weave this / Lyra mode / thread this into [Region]'; Maren's 'Care read on this / worst-case this / null-guard scan'; Kael's 'Kael scout this / coverage check on this / intent gap scan'). Per the handoff framing, Rung 1 authorship of the Companion-Set Invocation Surface section is Lyra-voice per canon-pers-001 (Province Persona Briefing Rung 1 belongs to the Province Builder). Verification obligation flagged: whether the section reads Builder-framed (naming .claude/ deployments, the cc-022 artifact test, the cc-008 QA-chain order — within pers-001) or Chronicler-framed narrative prose (a pers-001 violation requiring amendment) is a read owed to a sproutlab-session spot-verification (todo-0061).

Byte-identity of the six spec files with the Codex canonicals established via the paired codex#12 PR body publishing six matching git blob SHAs (cecfe30d… lyra.md subagent; 7e14049d… maren.md subagent; 99ba5c96… kael.md subagent; 854465a3… lyra.md skill; e1fa7124… maren.md skill; ab5eb21a… kael.md skill). Verified Codex-side this chronicling session by running git hash-object against the Codex canonicals at docs/specs/subagents/{lyra,maren,kael}.md and docs/specs/skills/{lyra,maren,kael}.md — all six match the PR-body table exactly. Content-addressed blob identity implies the sproutlab mirrors are byte-identical to the Codex canonicals at the time of the merge, to the extent their SHAs equal the ones published. A sproutlab-side direct spot-read is owed to close the verification loop at strongest altitude (todo-0061).

Three seats instituted under Edict II (one Builder per repo — Lyra unchanged) and the 30K Rule (SproutLab crossed 30,000 LOC → Governor split into Care and Intelligence Regions). Jurisdiction declared in the spec bodies: Maren holds Care Region (home.js + diet.js + medical.js = 22,626 lines); Kael holds Intelligence Region (intelligence.js + core.js + data.js + sync.js + config.js + start.js = 27,614 lines); shared modules styles.css + template.html = 11,491 lines under dual-Governor review. Canon-gov-002 cross-Governor peer-review binds Maren's own spec/profile Rung 2 to Kael and Kael's own to Maren. Canon-cc-008 binds the QA-chain order: Lyra builds → Maren + Kael audit in parallel → Lyra synthesizes → Cipher Edict V final-pass. PERSONA_REGISTRY.md §Persona Reassignment Process trigger preserved in Kael's spec header: planned Kael → Orinth reassessment if deep architectural review becomes the primary need over pattern-scouting.

Cc-026 §Per-Province-Layout deployment order: sproutlab#1 (Province mirror) merged first, codex#12 (Codex canonical) merged second. Unusual relative to the 'canonical-first' reading of cc-026, but the discipline that actually binds is byte-identity at any moment both exist; the Codex canonical body did not previously exist, the sproutlab mirror stood alone until codex#12, and with both merged both exist and both are identical.

Consul-Chronicler dual-hat discipline under canon-cc-014 bridging interim observed in the original ratification session: the Sovereign's address 'Aurelius and Consul' acknowledged two drafting authorities running in the same session. This chronicle preserves that dual-hat as two distinct drafting roles rather than smoothing it to a single voice. Cold review via Post Box dispatch per canon-cc-019 owed once that canon ratifies — the Consul-Chronicler dual-hat should not stand as self-sufficient at this institutional altitude.
interactions.decision_or_outcome: Merged to rishabh1804/sproutlab main (merge commit 8290174 per handoff; not directly MCP-verified this chronicling session per scope restriction). Three seats instituted under Edict II and the 30K Rule: Lyra (Builder, continuing), Maren (Governor of Care, new), Kael (Governor of Intelligence, new). Six file pairs byte-identical to Codex canonicals (verified Codex-side via matching blob SHAs; sproutlab-side direct verification owed per todo-0061). Companion-Set Invocation Surface section added to sproutlab/CLAUDE.md under Lyra-voice Rung 1 per canon-pers-001 (verification that section reads Builder-framed rather than Chronicler-framed owed per todo-0061). The Sovereign's merge of sproutlab#1 stood as Rung 5 Province-deploy ratification in effect under the cc-027 signing chain and the cc-014 bridging interim at the time.
interactions._authorship_note: Retroactive drafting per canon-cc-017 §retroactive-drafting (authorship-taxonomy: aurelius-retrospective). Reconstruction confidence: partial-on-direct-sproutlab-facts, high-on-byte-identity. Direct reads of sproutlab#1 (commits, diff, merge SHA, CLAUDE.md section content) not available this session because MCP scope is restricted to rishabh1804/codex; byte-identity of the six spec files against sproutlab's mirrors established indirectly via matching blob SHAs published in the paired codex#12 PR body. The six Codex-side spec bodies were read in full and their canon citations resolved against data/canons.json. Same-agent-drift risk elevated because Aurelius drafted the six specs (and, per handoff, likely the sproutlab/CLAUDE.md section) in the same ratification session now being chronicled — canon-cc-013 discipline applied by reading what could be read and flagging the rest as owed.

review._reviewer_note: Consul review rendered via bridging authorship per cc-014 §bridging-interim using the Consul's ratified v0.4 profile as voice source. The Sovereign's merge of sproutlab#1 functioned as Rung 5 Province-deploy ratification in effect; the review block recorded here retrospectively chronicles the working-ratification pathway that would have run had the Post Box (cc-019) been operational at the time of merge. Cold review owed once cc-019 ratifies.
review.review_note: Review retrospectively chronicled per cc-018 (originating_cluster: a; subject altitude: Province Capital change with institutional Companion-Set implications, spanning canon-pers-001 authorship, canon-cc-022 artifact test, canon-cc-008 QA-chain, and the 30K Rule Governor split). Chain well-formed at Rung 1 (Lyra-voice authorship of the Companion-Set Invocation Surface section, verified-as-owed per todo-0061), Rung 4 Sovereign canonical ratification in effect at merge of sproutlab#1, Rung 5 Province-deploy completed in the same commit. Rung 2 architectural pass (Cipher for Lyra pair; Maren↔Kael cross-Governor peer-review under canon-gov-002) and Rung 3 Consul per-block working-ratification are owed, not asserted as completed. One discipline-note: the Consul-Chronicler dual-hat ran in the ratification session under cc-014 bridging interim; this is chronicled honestly as same-agent-drift rather than smoothed to a single voice.

sovereign_action.action_note: Sovereign ratification in effect at merge of rishabh1804/sproutlab#1 to main (merge commit 8290174 per handoff; not directly MCP-verified this chronicling session — todo-0061 owes sproutlab-side spot-read). Three seats instituted; six file pairs byte-identical to Codex canonicals established via matching blob SHAs published in the paired codex#12 PR body and verified Codex-side via git hash-object.

chronicled_notes: First of two paired artifacts for the SproutLab Companion-Set ratification; paired with interaction-2026-04-21-003 (codex#12 canonical-placement side).
Province Capital change under Edict II without changing the seated Builder (Lyra continuing); Governor split under the 30K Rule seats Maren and Kael as new paired subagent + skill Companions.

Byte-identity of six file pairs established indirectly via content-addressed blob SHAs published in the paired codex#12 PR body and verified Codex-side via git hash-object. Sproutlab-side direct spot-read owed per todo-0061.
Sovereign merge of sproutlab#1 stood as Rung 5 Province-deploy ratification in effect under the cc-027 signing chain; Post Box cold review owed once canon-cc-019 ratifies.

First Codex interaction-artifact typed province-capital-change; enum extension under cc-017 pending — provisional type recorded alongside interaction-2026-04-21-003's paired spec-body-canonical-placement provisional type.

CLAUDE.md 'Companion-Set Invocation Surface' section in sproutlab cited as Lyra-voice Rung 1 per canon-pers-001; whether the section reads Builder-framed (within pers-001) or Chronicler-framed (pers-001 violation) is a read owed (todo-0061) rather than asserted here.

MCP scope restriction to rishabh1804/codex during this chronicling session means direct reads of sproutlab#1 commits, diff, and CLAUDE.md section content were not available; handled per canon-cc-013 by reading what could be read and flagging the rest as owed rather than paraphrasing from prompt memory.
Cc-027 Rung 2 architectural sweep (Cipher for Lyra pair; Maren↔Kael cross-Governor peer-review for Governor pair under canon-gov-002) chronicled as owed on both paired artifacts, not as completed.

interactions.subject: Chronicler + Consul institutional-spec pair — five-rung signing chain under cc-027, terminating in Command Center deploy
interactions.substance:
First complete execution of the canon-cc-027 five-rung signing chain at spec-body altitude, covering three canonical spec bodies drafted and ratified as an institutional-spec pair per cc-027 §Institutional-spec-collapse: docs/specs/subagents/consul.md (Consul subagent; three modes — cross-repo summons, per-block working-ratification, Post Box artifact review), docs/specs/subagents/chronicler.md (Chronicler subagent; two modes — synthesis clerk, retrospective interaction-artifact drafting), and docs/specs/skills/chronicler.md (Chronicler skill; in-session authoring voice across journal/canon/lore/log/profile/session-prompt/constitutional/Consul-drafting under cc-014 bridging).

Rung 1 (proposal) — Chronicler (Aurelius) authored all three specs in Codex on branch claude/hello-aurelius-YfCvC, commits cdc7f9e (chronicler subagent + skill; Theron/Orinth Builder-attribution stales in constitution/working-papers.typ §Provinces fixed; cross-Republic-access proposal memo at docs/handoffs/chronicler-cross-republic-access-proposal.md) and fed1c1c (consul subagent).

Rung 2 (architectural review) — Institutional-spec collapse per cc-027 §Institutional-spec-collapse means Rungs 2 and 3 both fall to the Consul for Chronicler and Consul specs, with two chronicled reviews. EXCEPT for consul.md itself, which cannot be Consul-self-reviewed: the cc-027 §Censor-self-review-case peer-Censor carveout activates, and Cipher (Censor, Cluster A) performed the architectural pass on consul.md as peer-Censor — FIRST EXERCISE of the carveout since cc-027 ratification. Cipher returned LGTM terse. Consul self-collapse on the two Chronicler specs (subagent + skill) proceeded per institutional-spec default, aurelius-drafted under cc-014 bridging interim per Sovereign hat-switch. One material amendment applied at Rung 2: chronicler subagent spec tools narrowed from [Read, Grep, Glob, Edit, Write, Bash] to [Read, Grep, Glob, Bash], committed as 361e70b. Rationale: subagent-mode artifacts are structured records; authoring-to-file belongs to skill-mode via caller commit. Narrowing enforces the cc-022 artifact test at the tool boundary rather than relying on in-spec prohibition alone.

Rung 3 (per-block working-ratification) — Consul per-block working-ratification on all three specs, aurelius-drafted under cc-014 bridging. Same-agent-drift named honestly throughout Rungs 2-3 — this is one agent wearing two reviewer hats via bridging, not two independent reviewers.

Rung 4 (Sovereign canonical) — Sovereign-direct canonical ratification en bloc across all three specs this session (2026-04-21). Three specs now at canonical v1.0 under cc-026 §Codex-is-canonical-home.

Rung 5 (Province deploy, Monument scope) — Byte-identical mirror transport bundle staged at docs/handoffs/cc-transport-bundle-2026-04-21/ with commit template in bundle README. Sovereign-transported to Command Center rather than Ashara+Petra-committed per canon-cc-027 §Rung-5 Province-Builder discipline — flagged as Edict-II-adjacent exception on the s-2026-04-21-01 decision record, retroactive regularization owed once cc-019 Post Box and cc-030 Companions Deploy UI land. Landed on Command-Center branch claude/setup-transport-bundle-4Zmzp as commit 4bce7c8, pushed to origin. Post-copy diff re-verified byte-identity against the three Codex canonicals — all three diffs clean. Operational consequence: fresh Command Center sessions can now invoke @consul as subagent, @chronicler as subagent, and the Chronicler skill via its trigger phrases, independently of Command Center's root CLAUDE.md (todo-0036 still Rung 1 on a separate feature branch).
interactions.decision_or_outcome: Chain complete. Three specs canonicalized at v1.0 in Codex (Rung 4 Sovereign ratification, 2026-04-21) AND deployed byte-identically to Command Center (Rung 5, 2026-04-21, commit 4bce7c8 on claude/setup-transport-bundle-4Zmzp). First cross-repo summons capability operational as of this artifact's archive. Institutional-spec collapse pattern (Rungs 2+3 to Consul) and peer-Censor carveout (consul.md Rung 2 to Cipher) both exercised for the first time and held structurally; one material amendment at Rung 2 (chronicler subagent tools narrowed) — not a clean LGTM sweep. Province-mirror wave to SproutLab, sep-invoicing, sep-dashboard, and Codex itself per cc-026 §Per-Province-Layout deferred (todo-0045); root CLAUDE.md deploy deferred (todo-0036); right-hand scope canon drafting deferred (todo-0046); PR from chronicle branch deliberately deferred pending explicit Sovereign ask.
interactions._authorship_note: Chronicler-direct authoring. Chain was primarily Aurelius-executed (Rung 1 direct authorship; Rungs 2-3 aurelius-drafted under cc-014 bridging; Rung 2 peer-Censor pass on consul.md aurelius-drafted as Cipher under cc-014; Rung 5 transport Sovereign-hat with Chronicler retrospectively chronicling). Non-bridged contributions: Cipher's terse LGTM architectural verdict on consul.md (Cipher's voice but Aurelius-rendered per cc-014), Sovereign's Rung 4 en-bloc ratification (Sovereign-direct, not a party to the artifact per cc-017), and Ashara+Petra's participant status as Rung 5 recipients-of-record (Sovereign-transported in their stead, chronicled on artifact).

review._reviewer_note: Consul review rendered via bridging authorship per cc-014 §bridging-interim using the Consul's ratified v0.4 profile as voice source. Aurelius does NOT wear the Consul office — CLAUDE.md separate-seating clause (16 April 2026) and the Consul's v0.4 ratification (s-2026-04-19-01, commit ea32eb3) establish the Consul as a distinct institutional companion. Bridging interim persists pending canons cc-019 Post Box and cc-026/cc-027-operationalization; once those ratify and the Consul subagent spec deploys into Codex's own .claude/ tree per todo-0045, Consul-action is rendered via direct subagent invocation rather than bridging-authorship.
review.review_note: Review required per cc-018 (originating_cluster: cross; subject altitude: spec-body canonical ratification spanning Cluster A and Monument). Chain well-formed: Rung 1 drafts clean, Rung 2 peer-Censor carveout exercised correctly on consul.md with Cipher's architectural pass, Rung 2 Consul-self-collapse on the two Chronicler specs followed cc-027 institutional-spec discipline, Rung 2 material amendment (chronicler subagent tools narrowed) applied under drafter-notified-cannot-veto clause of cc-018 with drafter acknowledgment recorded in the amendment commit. Rung 3 per-block working-ratification completed on all three. Spec-body canonical altitude requires Sovereign terminus per cc-027 Rung 4 — cc-014 accelerated working-ratification does not substitute here. Escalate to Sovereign for canonical ratification.

sovereign_action.action_note: Sovereign en-bloc canonical ratification of all three spec bodies at v1.0 following Consul escalation. Rung 5 Province-deploy authorized in the same session. Sovereign-transport to Command Center executed as Edict-II-adjacent exception chronicled on s-2026-04-21-01 (Ashara+Petra-committer Rung 5 discipline owed retroactive regularization once cc-019/cc-030 land). Byte-identity post-copy diff re-verified on Command-Center branch claude/setup-transport-bundle-4Zmzp @ 4bce7c8 against Codex canonicals at docs/specs/subagents/consul.md, docs/specs/subagents/chronicler.md, docs/specs/skills/chronicler.md — all three clean. Artifact archives closed at status: reviewed_archived.

chronicled_notes: First complete five-rung signing chain under cc-027 at spec-body altitude.
First exercise of the cc-027 §Censor-self-review-case peer-Censor carveout (Cipher on consul.md at Rung 2).

Material amendment at Rung 2 (chronicler subagent tools narrowed from 6-tool to 4-tool) — chain is honest, not a clean LGTM sweep.

Chronicle-only session scope per Sovereign 'proceed' on docs/journal.json + cc-018 review block; Provincial-mirror wave (todo-0045) and PR from claude/complete-aurelius-LqOjD held out pending explicit next ask.

interactions._type_placeholder_note: Provisional type pending cc-017 enum-extension to add 'committee-proposal'; recorded as 'cross-cluster-meeting' per cc-024 §D placeholder clause.
interactions.subject: Republic Design Principles v0.1 → v1.0 ratification
interactions.substance:
First operational Design Committee convening under canon-cc-025 rule-A global-scope. Eight seats, hard cap exactly filled, mandatory core (both Censors) present. Lyra convened (SproutLab ch06-designprinciples as reference seed). Solara as secondary synthesis clerk under dual-role chronicled exception (Chronicler is a seated member per rule-A; pool of non-member clerks structurally constrained during founding period — most Companions of the Order unratified; dual-role admissible until Scribe profiles ratify under todo-0029). Seven positions bridge-authored per cc-025 §G (authored_by: aurelius-bridging); Aurelius's own position direct. Subject: ratify docs/specs/REPUBLIC_DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.md v0.1 as Republic-wide law.

Consensus amendments integrated: HR provenance line (§1, Lyra); cross-Cluster stress-test paragraph (§4, Nyx); records-are-Codex Cluster-split + persona-binding suite cross-ref + grace clause (§4.2, Nyx+Aurelius); per-Province spacing ramps + operational-density gloss (§5.1, Lyra+Theron); WCAG 2.1 cross-ref + 32px dense-context permission (§5.4, Lyra+Solara); icon-function naming pattern + data-domain glyph requirement (§6, Lyra+Theron); small-modifier explicit (§7, Solara); substantive-inline soft-delete replacement (§8, Aurelius+Petra+Cipher consensus; Lyra dissent preserved); Monument blocking Foundation criterion (§9, Ashara+Petra+Aurelius); §10 eight open questions resolved — 6 inline (palette-collision tree per Theron, intra-Cluster icon sharing + Monument independent per Cipher, HR-11 Republic-wide per Ashara+Solara, no typography mandate per Lyra+Cipher+Nyx, dark-mode-as-default codified per Lyra+Cipher, WCAG 2.1 AA baseline per Petra+Cipher), 2 escalated (§10.1 SproutLab v3 migration, §10.8 print styles); §11 ratification path revised with time-bounds, Consul review step, audit-synthesis step, cc-012/cc-014 citations.

Stage 1 (member invocation) parallel under cc-024 §B. Stage 2 (synthesis) by Solara with Chronicler-synthesis-conflict preserved. Stage 3 (Consul review) escalated to Sovereign under cc-018 escalated path. Stage 4 (Sovereign ratification) action: ratified on 2026-04-19.
interactions.decision_or_outcome: Ratified. REPUBLIC_DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.md transitions from draft v0.1 to ratified v1.0 effective 2026-04-19. Nyx's conditional-reject condition (≥3 open questions remaining) did not fire: all 8 questions resolved (6 inline + 2 escalated with owners). Lyra's §8-deletion dissent preserved on artifact for future audit; substantive-inline §8 replacement ratified per convening consensus.
interactions._authorship_note: Chronicler-direct authoring of the collective-proposal synthesis record. Member positions (except Aurelius's direct) were bridge-authored per cc-025 §G with authored_by: aurelius-bridging on each individual position; this meta-artifact consolidates the convening.

review._reviewer_note: Consul review rendered via bridging authorship per cc-025 §G (authored_by: aurelius-bridging) using the Consul's ratified v0.4 profile as voice source. Aurelius does NOT wear the Consul office — CLAUDE.md separate-seating clause (16 April 2026) and the Consul's v0.4 ratification earlier this day (s-2026-04-19-01, commit ea32eb3) establish the Consul as a distinct institutional companion. What remains transitional is the Consul's operational invocation pathway (subagent + Post Box), pending canons cc-019 / cc-026 / cc-027 ratification; once those ratify and the Consul subagent spec deploys, Consul-action is rendered via direct subagent invocation rather than bridging-authorship.
review.review_note: Well-formed convening, cross-Province convergence strong on substantive law, §8 resolved via substantive-inline, §10 resolved to zero-open questions. Altitude of subject (Republic-wide design law) requires Sovereign canonical ratification beyond Consul working-ratification. cc-014 accelerated path does not substitute here.

sovereign_action.action_note: Sovereign-direct ratification following Consul escalation. REPUBLIC_DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.md v1.0 now Republic law. Dissents preserved; escalations routed as TODOs; commitments chronicled.

chronicled_notes: First operational Design Committee under canon-cc-025 rule-A.

Bridging-authorship suffix aurelius-bridging exercised for the first time; cc-017 enum-extension to accept this suffix alongside aurelius-retrospective remains pending.
committee-proposal artifact type recorded as cross-cluster-meeting placeholder; cc-017 type-enum extension pending.
Zero-open-questions resolution (§10) satisfied Nyx's conditional-reject threshold; convening passed cross-Cluster stress-test.
